info.name: FrostGate Admin Gateway — Tester Collection
info.description: End-to-end tester journey for FrostGate Admin Gateway. Requires a freshly seeded environment from `python tools/seed/run_seed.py`. Auth uses dev-bypass (FG_DEV_AUTH_BYPASS=1). All requests are gateway-facing; no direct core API access.

variable.description: Admin gateway base URL. Change to match your deployment.
Primary seed tenant. Matches DEFAULT_TENANT_ID in tools/seed/run_seed.py.
Populated automatically by the 'Get CSRF Token' request.

item.name: 0 — Canonical Tester Journey
item.description:
Minimum required sequence for a fresh tester. Run these requests top-to-bottom to prove the system works end-to-end: seed output exists, auth works, audit data is retrievable, and bundle export succeeds.

PREREQUISITES (run once before this folder):
1. python tools/seed/run_seed.py
   -> Runs audit cycle, captures session_id + export_path in state/seed/bootstrap_state.json
2. Create audit API key (needed for steps 4-5):
   python -c "
import os; os.environ.setdefault('FG_SQLITE_PATH','state/frostgate.db')
from api.auth_scopes import mint_key
print(mint_key('audit:read','audit:export',tenant_id='tenant-seed-primary',ttl_seconds=86400))"
3. Start admin gateway with that key as AG_CORE_API_KEY (see quickstart Step 2)
4. (Offline) Verify bundle: python tools/verify_bundle.py --bundle <export_path from seed output>

request.description: STEP 1 — Confirm the admin gateway is reachable. No authentication required. Expected: 200 {"status": "ok", ...}. If this fails, the gateway is not running — see quickstart Step 2.

STEP 2 — Authenticate. In dev mode (FG_DEV_AUTH_BYPASS=1, no OIDC configured), the gateway returns 302 + sets a signed session cookie. Postman follows the redirect and stores the cookie automatically. All subsequent steps in this folder use that cookie. Expected final: 200 at /admin/me.
STEP 3 — Confirm session is active and scopes are correct. Expected: 200 with user_id='dev-user', tenants=['tenant-seed-primary'], scopes containing 'console:admin'. If 401: re-run CTJ-2.

item.name: CTJ-4: Retrieve Audit Log (seed session visible)

request.description: STEP 4 — Retrieve the security audit log entries generated during and after seeding. Proxied to core GET /admin/audit/search (requires audit:read on AG_CORE_API_KEY — see prerequisites). Expected: 200 with items array. After seeding and authenticating, there will be at least one audit entry. If 503: AG_CORE_BASE_URL not configured. If 403: AG_CORE_API_KEY lacks audit:read — create an audit key (see prerequisites).

STEP 5 — Export audit events as streaming NDJSON. Proxied to core POST /admin/audit/export (requires audit:read on AG_CORE_API_KEY — see prerequisites). Expected: 200, Content-Type application/x-ndjson, Content-Disposition attachment. Save the response body to a file for offline inspection.

Note: To verify the AuditEngine evidence bundle (the compliance chain from the seed), use the offline tool:
  python tools/verify_bundle.py --bundle <export_path from state/seed/bootstrap_state.json>
Verify the admin gateway is running. No authentication required. Expected: 200 {"status": "ok", ...}.
Check service version metadata. No authentication required.

Initiates authentication. In dev-bypass mode (FG_DEV_AUTH_BYPASS=1 + no OIDC), the gateway responds 302 and sets a signed session cookie. Postman follows the redirect and stores the cookie automatically via its Cookie Jar. After this request succeeds, all subsequent requests in this collection are authenticated. Expected final status: 200 (redirected to /admin/me).
Returns authenticated user identity, granted scopes, and accessible tenants. Requires session cookie (set by Login step). Expected: 200 with user_id, scopes, and tenants fields.

Fetch a CSRF token. The test script stores it in the {{csrf_token}} collection variable for use in POST/PATCH/DELETE requests. Requires session cookie. Expected: 200 with csrf_token and header_name fields.
Returns all available scopes and the user's current scope grants. Useful for verifying the dev-bypass session has full console:admin scope hierarchy. Requires session cookie.
List all tenants the authenticated user can access. Requires session + product:read scope (granted via console:admin). Expected: 200 with tenants array including 'tenant-seed-primary'.
Proxies to core GET /admin/tenants/{tenant_id}. Requires session + product:read. Expected: 200 with tenant metadata.
Tenant-scoped usage counters proxied from core. Requires session + product:read. Expected: 200 with request_count, decision_count, quota_remaining, quota_limit, tier.
List API keys scoped to the seed tenant. Proxied to core GET /admin/keys. Requires session + keys:read. After seeding, expect to see the seedadmin_ and seedagent_ prefixes.

Search audit events for the seed tenant. Proxied to core GET /admin/audit/search. Requires session + audit:read. Expected: 200 with items array. After seeding, items should include audit events from the seed bootstrap (run_cycle, export_bundle).

item.name: Search Audit Events — Filtered by Action

request.description: Filter audit events by action=list_keys. Shows audit entries generated by the 'List Keys for Tenant' request above. Requires session + audit:read.

Streaming export of audit events as NDJSON. Proxied to core POST /admin/audit/export. Requires session + audit:read. No CSRF token required for this endpoint. Expected: 200 with Content-Type application/x-ndjson and Content-Disposition attachment.
Streaming export of audit events as CSV. Same endpoint as JSON export, different format. Expected: 200 with Content-Type text/csv.
List products registered for the tenant. Tenant resolved from X-Tenant-ID header. Requires session + product:read. Expected: 200 with products array and total.

header.description: Required for state-changing requests. Populated by 'Get CSRF Token'.

request.description: Create a product under the seed tenant. Requires session + product:write + X-CSRF-Token header (run 'Get CSRF Token' first). Expected: 201 with product object. Note: slug must be unique per tenant — re-running returns 409.
